global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with interactive gameplay elements and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to play and win rewards with friends.

elements.label: blue abstract background

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, playable, playful and modern, GlitchWave, win epic rewards.
